“i see your face, and i know i’m alive.”
(semi-established (frank has a crush on u..)

[Ormond, Canada. 2008.]

Before The Legion formed.

Frank, the new kid, Frank, who can’t stay with one family, Frank, who causes trouble, Frank, who broods and skulks alone on the snowy park bench— blood dribbling down his nose, bruises and swelling along the ridges of his face that tell you just enough to know what happened.

You’ve lived in Ormond longer. Yet Frank fit in quicker, and better than you, ever the loser. The weird kid no one paid no mind to— because they thought of you as boring, and unconventional. Yet he thinks otherwise. Staring at you. Too intensely.

“it drives me crazy, just drives me wild.”
